name: Chocolate Chip Pumpkin Cookies
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp baking soda dissolved in 1 tsp milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the pumpkin, sugar, oil, and eggs.
2. Add the dry ingredients (flour, baking powder, salt, baking soda mixture, and vanilla) to the pumpkin mixture.
3. Fold in the chocolate chips.
4. Drop rounded spoonfuls of dough onto a greased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 375°F for 12 minutes.
6. Remove from the sheet and allow to cool.
7. Frost with cream cheese frosting (homemade or store-bought).
